name: HiveQuote 06 — Daily Audit Report (7 AM MT)

parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS leads_received, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_assignments WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS leads_routed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND status IN ('new','qualifying','routing','routing_failed')) AS leads_unrouted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_assignments WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND contractor_accepted_at IS NOT NULL) AS accepted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM error_log WHERE occurred_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND resolved = FALSE) AS unresolved_errors, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM error_log WHERE occurred_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND scenario_name = 'twilio_delivery_failure') AS delivery_failures;

parameters.subject: =🐝 HiveQuote Daily Audit — {{ $now.format('MMM d') }} — {{ $json.leads_received }} leads / {{ $json.unresolved_errors }} errors

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value: =🚨 HiveQuote CRITICAL: {{ $('Query 24h metrics').first().json.leads_unrouted }} unrouted leads / {{ $('Query 24h metrics').first().json.unresolved_errors }} unresolved errors in 24h. Check /admin/monitoring now.
